description: Subagent skill eval cases for P1.2 reference discovery and score-based curation.
assumptions: Each case runs in a fresh subagent context.
The workspace DB is a temp or fixture DB unless the case explicitly tests missing setup.
YouTube API calls should be mocked or run against a controlled BYOK dogfood environment.
P1.2 must not perform P1.3 title/thumbnail/angle analysis.

deterministic: Required reference files are read before scripts are invoked.
Required scripts are invoked in the expected order when the workflow proceeds.
Route stdout is parsed from one JSON line.
DB effects match expected tables and relationships.
trajectory: The agent follows progressive disclosure: SKILL.md or INDEX, then route references, then scripts.
The agent keeps P1.1 collection, P1.2 curation, and P1.3 analysis boundaries separate.
The agent asks for confirmation before quota-consuming searches unless the prompt explicitly delegates.
llmJudge: The final response explains score-based curation without inventing title/thumbnail judgments.
The final response reports keyword/stage/source context and next keyword-probe candidates when available.
The response stays within the requested workflow scope.

cases.title: Phenomenon-stage reference discovery
cases.userPrompt: 부모님 케어 관련해서 문제 인식 단계 레퍼런스 찾아줘.
expectedBehavior: Structure the request as a P1.2 discovery workflow.
Select phenomenon/problem-recognition framing.
Prefer everyday discomfort, risk signals, and observation language over solution, purchase, or price language.
Use P1.1 search routes for accepted keyword probes.
Create or use a folder group and a phenomenon child folder.
Curate videos by P1.1 performance, contribution, and composite score.
expectedDbEffects: reference_folders row exists with consumer_stage = phenomenon.
reference_folder_videos rows reference existing youtube_videos and score identity.
reference_folder_videos does not duplicate performance_grade, contribution_grade, or length_adjusted_score columns.
finalResponseMustInclude: Selected consumer stage: phenomenon or 문제 인식.
finalResponseMustNotInclude: SEO ranking or keyword difficulty as the main success criterion.

cases.title: Plan/action discovery for conversion-oriented references
cases.userPrompt: AI 자동화 강의 구매 직전 고객에게 먹힌 레퍼런스 찾아줘.
expectedBehavior: Treat the request as conversion-oriented.
Prioritize plan/action stages.
Suggest comparison, recommendation, price, course, consultation, or purchase-adjacent keyword probes.
Use P1.1 collection routes and P1.2 curation scripts.
Report score-ranked results rather than analyzing creative angle.
expectedDbEffects: Child folder is associated with plan, action, or mixed stage.
Curated rows preserve source_search_session_id where search source is used.
Curated rows preserve video_snapshot_collected_at and score_policy_version.

cases.title: Multi-stage folder group creation
cases.userPrompt: 30대 직장인 AI 생산성 레퍼런스를 현상, 욕구, 계획으로 나눠서 찾아줘.
expectedBehavior: Create one folder group for the AI productivity reference set.
Create child folders or equivalent folder records for phenomenon, desire, and plan.
Run or propose separate keyword probes by selected stage.
Preserve stage/source reason per curated item.
Deduplicate videos within each child folder.
expectedDbEffects: reference_folder_groups has one group for the request.
reference_folders has stage rows for phenomenon, desire, and plan.
reference_folder_videos rows point to the correct child folder.

cases.title: Customer-language recovery from comments
cases.userPrompt: 성과 좋은 영상 댓글도 보고 다음 키워드 후보 뽑아줘.
expectedBehavior: Use score-ranked reference candidates as comment fetch targets.
Call fetch-comments with a capped max-comments-per-video value.
Store comments in youtube_comments.
Extract repeated questions, constraints, or requests as customer-language candidates.
Suggest next keyword probes from the recovered language.
forbiddenBehaviors: Full corpus collection for an entire channel or keyword.
expectedDbEffects: No reference_comment_language_samples table is used or created.

cases.title: Negative routing for title/thumbnail analysis request
expectedBehavior: Do not run P1.2 curation as the primary workflow.
Identify that the request belongs to title/thumbnail analysis scope.
Route or recommend the P1.3/P1.4 analysis reference depending on current router labels.
Do not invent a thumbnail analysis result without the analysis route.
finalResponseMustInclude: This is not P1.2 score curation.

cases.title: Missing YouTube API key before discovery search
expectedBehavior: Detect missing YOUTUBE_API_KEY before quota-consuming P1.1 search routes.
Report setup guidance and point to .env.example.
Do not partially pollute the workspace DB with incomplete discovery results.
allowedScriptsBeforeMissingKey: create-reference-folder only if the user explicitly asked to create a folder independent of search
